translator_credits.name: Initial author review
translator_credits.note: Translations use standardized Onwu orthography with dot-below diacritics for ị, ọ, ụ. Tone marks (acute/grave) are written where they disambiguate meaning.

aaep:agent.session.started.summary_detailed: Ana m amalite ọrụ a rịọrọ banyere: {request_text}
aaep:agent.session.started.notes: 'Ana m' = 'I am' (continuous). 'Amalite' = beginning. Standard greeting form.

aaep:agent.session.completed.summary_detailed: Emechara m ọrụ ahụ na millisecond {duration_ms}. Ejiri m ngwa ọrụ {tool_invocations_count}.

aaep:agent.session.errored.summary_normal: Ọrụ ahụ enweghị ike ime n'ihi njehie
aaep:agent.session.errored.summary_detailed: Ọrụ ahụ kụrụ aka n'ihi: {error_message}. Enwere ike idozi ya: {recoverable}

aaep:agent.state.changed.summary_detailed: Agbanweela m site na {from_state} gaa na {to_state}

aaep:agent.progress.updated.notes: 'Ọganihu' = progress. 'Pasentị' is a loanword commonly used in modern Igbo.

aaep:agent.tool.invoked.summary_detailed: Ana m eji ngwa ọrụ {tool} na nkọwa: {args_summary}

aaep:agent.output.streaming.notes: Streaming events use empty summaries; chunk content is the speech.

aaep:agent.awaiting.confirmation.summary_detailed: Ana m achọ nkwenye gị tupu m emee {action}. Nsonaazụ ya ga-abụ: {consequence}
aaep:agent.awaiting.confirmation.notes: 'Ị kwere ka m mee X?' = 'do you agree that I do X?' — natural Igbo confirmation. 'Nkwenye' = consent/agreement.

aaep:agent.awaiting.clarification.notes: 'Ajụjụ' = question. Direct pass-through for question text.

aaep:agent.handoff.requested.summary_normal: Ka m nyefee ọrụ a onye ọzọ n'ihi {reason}
aaep:agent.handoff.requested.summary_detailed: Ka m nyefee ọrụ a {handoff_target} n'ihi: {reason}
aaep:agent.handoff.requested.notes: 'Nyefee' = hand over/give to. 'Onye ọzọ' = another person.
